eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofit organizations with an arts or culture component in their broader mission
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated beyond organizational eligibility (e.g., nonprofit status, NYC-based operations)
eligibility_summary: Eligible organizations must be NYC-based nonprofits (501(c)(3) or fiscally sponsored) with a history of arts/culture services in the city for the last two consecutive years. Ineligible entities include individual artists, LLCs, schools, government programs, and organizations without a NYC administrative base or prior compliance history.
